summary: Two-context Playwright run for P2 end-to-end student-join flow. Admin/proctor side works fully (login, daily code render, status, counts, disabled Start at 0 joined). Student side reaches teacher-verify → tests-selector → test-code page (the new multi-step flow not documented in iteration_10), but the code-submit step does NOT navigate to /student/waiting/<attemptId> via the Playwright fill+click path, so steps 5-9 of the request (waiting-room confirm, Start, mid-test, Pause, End) could not be exercised live.

integration_issues.issue: After successfully landing on /student/test-code/<enrollmentId>/<testId>/EOC and filling the 6 code-input boxes (data-testid code-input-0..5) one char at a time, then clicking [data-testid=code-submit], the URL did NOT change to /student/waiting/<attemptId> and the proctor view's count-joined stayed at 0 (4-second poll + manual reload, neither saw the student). No code-error element was rendered either. Two likely causes: (a) the CodeBoxes onChange auto-advances focus per char, but Playwright's page.fill on an input with maxLength=1 may steal focus / reset the parent `code` state between fills so the final state of `code` is just the last char (length<6 -> setError('Enter all 6 characters of your test code.') would have shown — it didn't, so it's not this); (b) the submit button is disabled because the test state in StudentTestCode.jsx is still null (line 88 filter `(x.id === testId && (x.phase || x.test_type) === phase)` may miss the test if getOpenTestsForCourse returns it with a different phase key shape, leaving the Continue button gated by `disabled={submitting || !test}` line 172). The proctor URL we used (testId c3bdbef0..., phase EOC) is the SAME test the tests-selector renders as data-testid 'test-pick-c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4-EOC', and the tile shows '42 questions · Window 2026-05-11 → 2026-05-12', so the test IS open. Suggest main agent: log a console.warn in StudentTestCode.jsx useEffect if `t` is null after getOpenTestsForCourse, and verify the phase value the RPC actually returns (could be lower-case 'eoc' vs URL 'EOC').

Flow now has TWO extra hops not mentioned in iteration_10 context: clicking the course tile goes to /student/teacher-verify/<enrollmentId> (must click data-testid='teacher-verify-yes'), then to /student/tests/<enrollmentId> (must click data-testid='test-pick-<testId>-<PHASE>'), THEN to /student/test-code/.... iteration_10's notes said the tile goes directly to test-code — that is no longer true. Recommend updating context-for-next-testing-agent so future Playwright runs include these two clicks.

action_items: Investigate why redeemTestCode submit on /student/test-code does not navigate to /student/waiting/<id>. Check: (a) is StudentTestCode.jsx's local `test` state null after getOpenTestsForCourse for testId c3bdbef0... phase=EOC for student 300432? Add a console.warn if null; (b) does Playwright's per-input fill on maxLength=1 boxes reliably build a 6-char `code` value? Consider exposing data-testid='code-hidden' or accepting an aggregated paste so automation has a single fill target.
Document the new 3-step student flow (courses → teacher-verify → tests → test-code) in any QA / E2E docs; iteration_10's context was out of date.
Optional polish: when StudentTestCode.jsx renders with test=null, show a small explanatory note instead of silently disabling Continue.
critical_code_review_comments: StudentTestCode.jsx line 88 silently sets test=null when the RPC's row shape doesn't match (testId AND (phase || test_type) === phase). If getOpenTestsForCourse returns `phase: 'eoc'` (lower-case) while the URL param is 'EOC' (upper), the Continue button stays disabled and the form looks frozen. Normalize both sides to upper-case before comparing.

CodeBoxes (StudentTestCode.jsx line 15-66) is hostile to test automation: the 6 separate inputs require sequential fills + focus tracking. Recommend adding either a single hidden aggregator input with data-testid='code-aggregated' or supporting a one-shot paste API for automated tests.

Proctor.jsx still relies on window.prompt() for pause-reason (line 136) — Playwright's dialog handler works but breaks visual consistency with the Start/End shadcn AlertDialogs. Same callout as iteration_10.

success_rate.frontend: Admin/Proctor side 100%: staff login, /admin/tests today-window filter (Bio1 EOC 2026-05-11→2026-05-12), section roster, proctor route (code YQJ9C6, status Waiting room, count-joined=0, proctor-start disabled). Student side ~60%: login, course tile click, teacher-verify, test-selector tile click, navigation to test-code page all PASS. Code submit → waiting room FAIL. Steps 6-10 of the request (proctor sees Joined, Start, redirect to test, Pause, End) BLOCKED by the test-code submit issue.

test_credentials: super@hpa.test / HPATestUser123 (verified). Student 300432 Nathaniel Abrica in section 8bdcad7b-1fea-4d7f-904d-7fbd5cf26705 (Pre-AP Biology 1, Chandler Karen, Highland Prep) — verified login + reaches /student/test-code.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing Biology 1 EOC window (2026-05-11 → 2026-05-12) extended by user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bio 1 test (id c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4) EOC window is OPEN today (2026-05-11→2026-05-12). Daily code right now = YQJ9C6. Section 8bdcad7b-1fea-4d7f-904d-7fbd5cf26705. Student 300432 Nathaniel Abrica is enrolled. UPDATED student flow has 3 clicks before code entry: (1) /student/courses → click 'Pre-AP Biology 1' tile → (2) /student/teacher-verify/<enrollmentId> → click data-testid='teacher-verify-yes' → (3) /student/tests/<enrollmentId> → click data-testid='test-pick-c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4-EOC' → (4) /student/test-code/... fill 6 code-input-N boxes → click code-submit. Step (4) is failing — see frontend_issues. Once main agent fixes the test-code submit path (likely case-sensitivity on phase comparison in StudentTestCode.jsx useEffect, or CodeBoxes fill behavior), the rest of the flow (waiting-room → proctor-start → student auto-redirect → pause-300432 → proctor-end + auto-submit) should be re-tested with the same credentials.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA — student code-submit doesn't redirect: After multi-step navigation, the StudentTestCode page is reached at /student/test-code/aaade6be-8ab0-4fa3-be28-1d9c02064fe5/c3bdbef0-66e9-4e38-9b7b-0819910caab4/EOC. We filled code-input-0..5 with 'Y','Q','J','9','C','6' (matching the proctor's data-testid='proctor-code' value 'YQJ9C6'), then clicked code-submit. The URL stayed on /student/test-code, no /student/waiting/<id> redirect, and on the proctor side count-joined remained 0 after a 4.5s wait + manual reload. No code-error element was rendered either. Hypothesis A (most likely): Submit button is disabled because component state `test` is null. StudentTestCode.jsx line 88: `const t = (open || []).find(x => x.id === testId && (x.phase || x.test_type) === phase);` — if getOpenTestsForCourse returns the phase as 'eoc' (lower) while URL phase param is 'EOC' (upper), comparison fails, t=null, button disabled, click is no-op. Hypothesis B: CodeBoxes auto-advance + Playwright per-input fill caused the parent `code` string to not accumulate to 6 chars — but in that case onSubmit would have set error 'Enter all 6 characters' which we'd have seen in code-error. Reproduction: login as 300432 → click Pre-AP Biology 1 → teacher-verify-yes → click test-pick-c3bdbef0...-EOC → fill code → submit → observe no nav. Mitigation: normalize phase compare to upper-case in StudentTestCode.jsx line 88, OR add a console.warn when t is null so the failure is visible.
